title: Curated icon SVG geometry (source)
description: Schema for components/src/icons-svg.json — hand-curated {viewBox, body} geometry for a subset of DS Kit icons. Provenance (dsKey/nodeId/group) is joined at derive time from the registry + icon-groups.json and is NOT stored here. The currentColor coloring contract is enforced by tests/icons-svg.test.js, not this schema.

_schema_version.description: Substrate schema version. Pinned at 1; bump only on a schema-incompatible change to the file shape.

_regen.description: Optional provenance block describing how this file is regenerated. See $defs.regenBlock.

examples.instructions: Re-extract a slug when its Figma node changes.

icons.description: Map of icon slug -> geometry. Slug keys are lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens and must exist in the dskit registry as category Icons (enforced at derive time).

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox: four space-separated numbers (minX minY width height).

body.description: Inner SVG markup (paths/groups), no root <svg>. Every fill/stroke normalized to currentColor (enforced in tests/icons-svg.test.js).

regenBlock.description: Structured provenance block. Shared shape across Class C JSONs in this substrate.

source.description: Where the canonical content comes from.

lastSync.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent sync; omit for manual.

instructions.description: Prose telling a human/AI how to update this file responsibly.
examples: Re-extract a slug when its Figma node changes.

fileKey.description: Figma file key, when source = figma.

nodeId.description: Figma node id, when source = figma.
